A kernel for the Q# language.

Usage: /tmp/inspectra-help-microsoft.quantum.iqsharp-0.28.302812-1fef15cb817f44c3a185ef4043eec72a/tool/dotnet-iqsharp [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information
  --version                Show version information
  --cacheFolder <FOLDER>   Specifies the folder to use to create temporary cache files.
  -w|--workspace <FOLDER>  Specifies the workspace root folder. All .qs files inside this folder will be automatically compiled and the corresponding operations available for simulation.
  --skipAutoLoadProject    Specifies whether to skip automatically loading the .csproj from the workspace's root folder.

Commands:
  install                  Installs the Q# (iqsharp) kernel into Jupyter.
  kernel                   Runs the Q# kernel. Typically only run by a Jupyter client.
  server                   Runs IQSharp as an HTTP server.

result.stdout:
Installs the Q# (iqsharp) kernel into Jupyter.

Usage: /tmp/inspectra-help-microsoft.quantum.iqsharp-0.28.302812-1fef15cb817f44c3a185ef4043eec72a/tool/dotnet-iqsharp install [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                Show help information
  --develop                   Installs a kernel spec that runs against this working directory. Useful for development only.
  --user                      Installs the kernel for the current user only.
  --sys-prefix                Installs the kernel into the prefix given by Python's sys.prefix. Useful with conda env/venv.
  -l|--log-level <LEVEL>      Level of logging messages to emit to the console. On development mode, defaults to Information.
  --prefix <PREFIX>           Prefix to use when installing the kernel into Jupyter. See `jupyter kernelspec install --help` for details.
  --path-to-tool <PATH>       Specifies an explicit path to the kernel tool being installed, rather than using the .NET command. This option is incompatible with --develop, and isn't typically needed except in CI builds or other automated environments.
  --extra-install-arg <ARG>   Specifies an extra argument to pass to Jupyter when installing this kernel.
  --name <NAME>               Specifies the name of the kernel to be installed; if not specified, defaults to iqsharp.
  --user-agent-extra <AGENT>  Sets additional user agent information to be sent to the kernel.

commands.payload:
Installs the Q# (iqsharp) kernel into Jupyter.

Usage: /tmp/inspectra-help-microsoft.quantum.iqsharp-0.28.302812-1fef15cb817f44c3a185ef4043eec72a/tool/dotnet-iqsharp install [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                Show help information
  --develop                   Installs a kernel spec that runs against this working directory. Useful for development only.
  --user                      Installs the kernel for the current user only.
  --sys-prefix                Installs the kernel into the prefix given by Python's sys.prefix. Useful with conda env/venv.
  -l|--log-level <LEVEL>      Level of logging messages to emit to the console. On development mode, defaults to Information.
  --prefix <PREFIX>           Prefix to use when installing the kernel into Jupyter. See `jupyter kernelspec install --help` for details.
  --path-to-tool <PATH>       Specifies an explicit path to the kernel tool being installed, rather than using the .NET command. This option is incompatible with --develop, and isn't typically needed except in CI builds or other automated environments.
  --extra-install-arg <ARG>   Specifies an extra argument to pass to Jupyter when installing this kernel.
  --name <NAME>               Specifies the name of the kernel to be installed; if not specified, defaults to iqsharp.
  --user-agent-extra <AGENT>  Sets additional user agent information to be sent to the kernel.

result.stdout:
Runs the Q# kernel. Typically only run by a Jupyter client.

Usage: /tmp/inspectra-help-microsoft.quantum.iqsharp-0.28.302812-1fef15cb817f44c3a185ef4043eec72a/tool/dotnet-iqsharp kernel [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  connection-file             Connection file used to connect to a Jupyter client.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                Show help information
  -l|--log-level <LEVEL>      Level of logging messages to emit to the console. Defaults to Error.Can also be set with the IQSHARP_LOG_LEVEL environment variable.
  --user-agent-extra <AGENT>  Sets additional user agent information to be sent to the kernel.
  --user-agent <AGENT>        Specifies which user agent has initiated this kernel instance.
  --hosting-env <ENV>         Specifies the hosting environment that this kernel is being run in.
  --cacheFolder <FOLDER>      Specifies the folder to use to create temporary cache files.
  -w|--workspace <FOLDER>     Specifies the workspace root folder. All .qs files inside this folder will be automatically compiled and the corresponding operations available for simulation.
  --skipAutoLoadProject       Specifies whether to skip automatically loading the .csproj from the workspace's root folder.
